title: Rename device - new name on the Support device card
scenario: Renamed device name is not reflected on the Support device card in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a connected device that supports renaming.
2. Tap the device name at the top of the Home screen to enter edit mode, then change the device name to a new name (e.g., "My Poly Device").
4. Tap on the device card displayed on the Support screen.
5. Observe the device name shown on the device card.
expected: The device card on the Support screen displays the new (renamed) device name.
